summary: High-output week with a major new distribution channel (Checkout.com pilot structured, 25-40% auth lift confirmed), BoA/Kount agreement strategy resolved, and Kount biweekly cadence locked in. Slight drag from Hootsuite revenue anomaly (Feb down ~50%) that needs diagnosis before it becomes a board-level risk, and several key tasks still in-flight (F1 invites pending, APA signatures outstanding). The RTN network and enterprise partnership stack are clearly accelerating.

history.summary: Checkout.com pilot structured, BoA/Kount strategy resolved, Kount biweekly locked in, CB911 board/CTO alignment. Hootsuite revenue anomaly and outstanding task closeouts keep it from a 9.
Major client breakthrough (Total Security 3x volume), RTN banking network scaling, systematic partnership processes established. Hughes relationship requires rebuild but strategy clear.
